label: Reliquary Sleep Alcove
description: Reliquary Sleep Alcove is a compact bedroom carved into the vitrified-stone hab tier of Nullglow Reliquary Rooms, its bulkheads thickened with slagcrete and scavenged plasteel for storm and auroral insulation. A shock-bolted cot recess and narrow deck-space sit beneath hooded lumen strips, their light muted by layered insulation curtains hung to seal drafts from the central ventilation spine. Built-in storage niches are set flush to the wall to preserve clearance around cable conduits and utility stanchions tied into the bastion’s shielded services. The air carries the dry rasp of overworked filters and the faint grit of ashfall arrested at the seals.
